videos.description:
#mathematics #project #icse #stdx #internalassessment #comparative #newspaper #Comparativenewspapercoverageofdifferentitems.



ACTIVITY :INTRODUCTION To find from a particular newspaper the coverage of news items with respect to thetotal number of pages.MATERIALS REQUIRED -1. A Newspaper2. A Highlighter or marker3. Ruler4. Graph paperPROCEDURE -1. Find the area of a printed page of the newspaper2. Multiply the number of pages with the area of one page to get the total area of the news
